hero.title: Elegance & Comfort
hero.titleAccent: in the heart of the capital
hero.subtitle: Discover a 3-star boutique hotel with refined design, offering warm hospitality and international-class services.

about.title: A unique concept setting a new standard in Bangui
about.p1: Opened on June 5, 2026, KM Hotel was born from the vision of Central African entrepreneur Francis Kopaye. Built on the historic walls of the former Hotel Somba, in the heart of the capital, this boutique hotel revitalizes the local hospitality sector.
about.p2: While the market faces challenging times with few internationally-standard establishments, KM Hotel focuses on refined style and a unique concept. Our ambition? To become the undisputed reference in hospitality in the Central African Republic.
about.p3: We deploy an array of services designed to attract guests from all corners of the globe, blending the charm of Central African hospitality with international standards.

amenities.title: Absolute Comfort & Serenity
amenities.subtitle: KM Hotel has been designed to meet all your expectations. From our complete energy autonomy to our relaxation spaces, every detail matters.

items.title: Electrical Autonomy
items.desc: Enjoy an uninterrupted stay thanks to our 100% autonomous and reliable power supply system.

items.title: Water Autonomy
items.desc: An independent water reserve ensuring optimal and continuous comfort in all our facilities.

items.title: High-Speed Internet
items.desc: Stay connected with the world through our fast and free Wi-Fi throughout the establishment.

items.title: Gourmet Restaurant
items.desc: A refined menu blending local flavors and international cuisine to delight the most discerning palates.

items.title: Cozy Bar Lounge
items.desc: Unwind with our wide selection of wines, champagnes and spirits in an elegant setting.

items.title: Conference Rooms
items.desc: Two modular spaces perfectly equipped for your professional meetings or private events.

rooms.title: Our 31 Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Refined design and modern comfort for an unforgettable stay in the heart of Bangui. All our rooms benefit from our electrical and water autonomy.

card1.name: Comfort Room
card1.desc: Queen Size Bed, Desk, High-speed Wi-Fi, Air conditioning.

card2.name: Executive Suite
card2.desc: King Size Bed, Separate Lounge, City View, VIP Services.

dining.title: Refined Restaurant &
dining.p1: Discover a unique culinary experience in our gourmet restaurant. Our chef offers a refined menu, subtly blending quality local produce with the great classics of international cuisine.
dining.p2: At the end of the day, our Bar Lounge welcomes you in a warm and cozy atmosphere. Enjoy our curated selection offering a wide range of wines, champagnes and spirits for your relaxation moments or business meetings.

testimonials.title: What Our Guests Say
testimonials.subtitle: Discover the reviews of our guests who have experienced KM Hotel. Their satisfaction is our greatest reward.

contact.title: Ready to Stay at KM Hotel?
contact.subtitle: Our team is at your disposal to organize your stay, professional events or private receptions.

footer.description: Bangui's new hospitality gem. A 3-star boutique hotel offering comfort, elegance and total autonomy in the heart of the Central African capital.
footer.copyright: KM Hotel Bangui. All rights reserved.

hero.title: Our Rooms
hero.subtitle: Rooms with refined design, designed for your absolute comfort in the heart of Bangui.

intro.title: The Art of Hospitality
intro.text: Each room at KM Hotel has been meticulously designed to offer a unique stay experience. Contemporary design, noble materials, premium bedding and modern technologies combine to create an elegant and soothing atmosphere. Enjoy our complete electrical and water autonomy, a guarantee of tranquility at all times.

rooms.name: Comfort Room
rooms.description: Our Comfort rooms combine contemporary design and functionality. Ideal for business travelers or short stays, they offer an ergonomic workspace and everything needed for a pleasant stay.
features: Queen Size Bed with premium linens

rooms.name: Deluxe Room
rooms.description: A step above, the Deluxe room offers generous space and premium amenities. Its refined decoration creates a soothing atmosphere for an exceptional stay experience.
features: King Size Bed with memory foam topper
Large bay window with city view

rooms.name: Executive Suite
rooms.description: Our Executive Suite is the embodiment of discreet luxury. With its vast separate living space, it is equally suited for high-level business stays or couples seeking an unforgettable experience.
features: Separate bedroom with King Size Bed
Spacious lounge with convertible corner sofa
Luxurious bathroom with shower and bathtub
Champagne and fresh fruit upon arrival

rooms.name: Presidential Suite
rooms.description: The pinnacle of elegance at KM Hotel. The Presidential Suite occupies the top floor with breathtaking views of Bangui. Every detail has been designed to offer a royal experience to our most discerning guests.

cta.title: Experience KM Hotel
cta.text: Treat yourself to the best of Central African hospitality. Book your room or suite now.

hero.title: Our Suites

intro.title: Excellence in Every Detail
intro.text: Our suites are designed to offer the ultimate luxury experience. Generous spaces, bespoke services and attention to the smallest details make every stay an unforgettable moment.

hero.title: Wellness & Relaxation Area
hero.subtitle: Pools, spa, hammam and zen garden: a wellness sanctuary at the heart of KM Hotel to recharge your mind and body.

intro.title: The Art of Well-Being
intro.text: At KM Hotel, we have created a space dedicated to your well-being. Between our luxurious pools, intimate spa and lush relaxation areas, every moment is an invitation to unwind. Let yourself be carried away by a soothing atmosphere and treat yourself to a moment of serenity.

pools.title: Swim in Luxury
pools.subtitle: Two pools designed for your pleasure: an outdoor infinity pool bathed in sunlight, and a heated indoor pool accessible year-round.

items.title: Outdoor Pool
items.desc: A large infinity pool surrounded by sunbeds and umbrellas, perfect for cooling off and relaxing under the Central African sun.

items.title: Heated Indoor Pool
items.desc: Our heated indoor pool lets you enjoy swimming year-round. A bright and elegant space with panoramic views.

relaxation.title: Relaxation Spaces
relaxation.subtitle: Spa, hammam, sauna and zen garden: a range of wellness experiences to deeply recharge your batteries.

items.title: Spa & Massages
items.desc: An intimate spa offering a full range of treatments: relaxing massages, facial treatments, body wraps and wellness rituals.

items.title: Hammam & Sauna
items.desc: Relax in our traditional hammam or dry sauna. A purifying experience for body and mind, ideal after a work day.

items.title: Zen Garden & Terrace
items.desc: A calm, lush landscaped garden with a shaded terrace. The perfect place to read, meditate or simply enjoy the peace and quiet.

cta.title: Treat Yourself to a Wellness Moment
cta.text: Whether for a relaxation day or a specific treatment, our team is at your disposal to offer you an unforgettable experience.

hero.title: Restaurant & Bar Lounge
hero.subtitle: A refined culinary experience and a cozy bar lounge for your relaxation moments at KM Hotel.

intro.title: Culinary Journey in the Heart of Africa
intro.p1: The KM Hotel restaurant invites you on a unique culinary journey. Our talented chef enhances the finest local produce — fresh fish from the Oubangui River, quality meats, sun-drenched fruits and vegetables — adding a touch of modernity and refinement.
intro.p2: In an elegant setting with warm, natural tones, every meal becomes a memorable experience. Whether for a business breakfast, a lunch with colleagues, or a romantic dinner, our team takes great care of you.

highlights.title: On-site Dining
highlights.subtitle: Whether you are a hotel guest or an outside visitor, our dining spaces are open to you.

items.title: Breakfast Buffet
items.desc: A generous buffet featuring artisan pastries, fresh fruit, local specialties and hot drinks. A great way to start the day.

items.title: Lunch & Dinner
items.desc: A refined menu that celebrates local produce: Oubangui River fish, grilled meat, fresh market vegetables, all enhanced with international flavors.

items.title: Bar Lounge & Cocktails
items.desc: A curated selection of wines, champagnes and spirits, signature cocktails crafted by our bartender, all in a warm and elegant atmosphere.

menu.title: Chef's Suggestions
menu.subtitle: Our chef selects the best seasonal produce to offer a regularly renewed menu.

dishes.name: Captain Fish Skewers
dishes.desc: Oubangui River fish marinated in local spices, served with fragrant rice and sautéed vegetables

dishes.name: Pepper-Crusted Beef Tenderloin
dishes.desc: Tender grilled fillet, green peppercorn sauce, dauphinoise gratin and green beans

dishes.name: Revisited Yassa Chicken
dishes.desc: Confit chicken thighs in onion-lemon marinade, sweet potato mash

dishes.name: Vegetarian Plate
dishes.desc: Seasonal roasted vegetables, herb quinoa, vinaigrette sauce and parmesan crisp

bar.label: Bar Lounge
bar.title: The Art of Relaxation
bar.text: At the end of the day, our Bar Lounge welcomes you in a warm and cozy atmosphere. Deep sofas, dim lighting, background music: the perfect place to unwind after a day of work or exploration.

cocktails.name: KM Sunset
cocktails.desc: Rum, passion fruit juice, ginger syrup, fresh mint

cocktails.name: Bangui Mule
cocktails.desc: Vodka, local ginger beer, lime, angostura

cocktails.name: Tropical Sangria
cocktails.desc: Red wine, exotic fruits, cinnamon, sparkling water

cocktails.name: Hibiscus Mocktail
cocktails.desc: Hibiscus infusion, lemongrass, honey syrup, sparkling water (non-alcoholic)

cta.title: Reserve Your Table
cta.text: Whether for a romantic dinner, a business lunch or an evening with friends, our team offers you a warm welcome.
